title: Chlorocharis tuberculosa

The plant belongs to the genus Chlorocharis, which is a group of flowering plants that are known for their unique characteristics. Chlorocharis tuberculosa is classified as an epiphyte, meaning it grows on other plants or objects. Its classification is further broken down into the kingdom Plantae, division Magnoliophyta, and class Magnoliopsida.
